title: SSH & File Transfer
html:
SSH & File Transfer

Contents

  • SSH connect
  • Keys
  • Tunneling
  • File transfer
  • ~/.ssh/config (handy aliases)

SSH connect

CommandDescription
 
ssh user@host
basic
ssh -p 2222 user@host
non-default port
ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 user@host
specific key
ssh -J jump@bastion user@target
ProxyJump (multi-hop)
ssh -X user@host
X11 forwarding (GUI apps)
ssh -t user@host 'sudo command'
force TTY for interactive sudo

Keys

CommandDescription
 
ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C 'comment'
generate ed25519 key
ssh-copy-id user@host
install pubkey on remote
ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
add to running agent
ssh-add -l
list keys in agent
ssh-keyscan host >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
trust remote host fingerprint

Tunneling

CommandDescription
 
ssh -L 8080:internal:80 user@host
local: localhost:8080 → internal:80
ssh -R 9000:localhost:22 user@host
remote: host:9000 → my:22 (reverse)
ssh -D 1080 user@host
SOCKS proxy on localhost:1080
ssh -fNT -L 8080:internal:80 host
background, no shell, no TTY

File transfer

CommandDescription
 
scp file user@host:/tmp/
copy file to remote
scp -r dir user@host:/tmp/
recursive
scp -P 2222 user@host:/etc/hosts .
from remote, custom port
rsync -avP src/ user@host:/dst/
archive, verbose, progress
rsync -avzP --delete src/ host:/dst/
compress + mirror (delete extras)
rsync -avP --dry-run src/ host:/dst/
preview without copying
sftp user@host
interactive secure FTP

~/.ssh/config (handy aliases)

Host bastion
  HostName 1.2.3.4
  User admin
  IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_bastion

Host internal-*
  ProxyJump bastion
  User root

Host *
  ServerAliveInterval 60
  ServerAliveCountMax 3
  AddKeysToAgent yes
